Lorem Ipsum Generator

Generate placeholder text for your layouts and mockups. Choose how many paragraphs you need and copy instantly.

3
110

What is Lorem Ipsum?

Lorem ipsum is a type of placeholder text used by designers, developers and publishers since the 1960s to fill space in layouts and mockups where final content is not yet available. The standard Lorem ipsum passage begins "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit…" and derives from a scrambled excerpt of Cicero's "de Finibus Bonorum et Malorum" (45 BC), a work on the theory of ethics.

When do designers and developers use Lorem Ipsum?

When designing a website layout, newsletter template, mobile app or printed document, real content usually isn't available at the design stage. Placeholder text fills the space so you can visualize how typography, line height, column widths and spacing will look with actual content. It prevents reviewers from getting distracted by the meaning of real text and focusing on the design decisions instead.

How many paragraphs do I need?

For a typical webpage section or article mockup, 2–3 paragraphs is usually sufficient to show how the layout handles real text volume. For a full-page design like a landing page or brochure, 4–6 paragraphs give a more realistic preview. For testing how a layout handles very long content — pagination, overflow, scrolling — use the maximum setting.

Is Lorem Ipsum still the best placeholder text?

Lorem ipsum remains the industry standard because reviewers recognize it as intentional placeholder text, preventing confusion with real content. Some designers prefer "blind text" generators in their native language, or use AI to generate topically relevant placeholder copy. For language-sensitive layouts like right-to-left scripts, you should always test with real representative text rather than Latin placeholder copy.

Is this free?

Yes. Completely free, no login required. Generate as much placeholder text as you need.
